infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Bricks Driver needs your location to find nearby ride and delivery requests.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Bricks Driver needs background location to track your progress during a trip even when the screen is off.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Bricks Driver tracks your location to provide accurate ETAs to customers.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow GFAX Driver to use your location.
